title: wylia grandiflora
side_effects: Wylia grandiflora can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea and vomiting in some individuals, especially those with sensitive stomachs. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can also cause dizziness and headaches due to its high concentration of volatile oils. Furthermore, Wylia grandiflora may interact with certain medications, leading to adverse reactions such as increased heart rate and blood pressure. In extreme cases, improper use of Wylia grandiflora can cause respiratory distress and allergic reactions, requiring immediate medical attention.
